request.brief: Create a B2B SaaS marketing page handoff that can be inspected by a local app before implementation.
request.audience: Finance operations leaders evaluating month-end close automation.
request.goal: Move qualified visitors from proof review to demo request.
constraints: Keep retrieval and artifact references safe for committed fixtures.
Preserve schema references instead of embedding artifact payloads.

assumptions: The local app can read repository-relative paths.
Remote storage URLs are configured outside committed fixtures.
notes: This query context is intentionally provider-neutral.
